message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "Wellbie" as Wellbie
participant "Quis" as Quis
participant "UserDigitalProfile" as UserDigitalProfile
participant "Challenges" as Challenges
participant "Achievements" as Achievements
participant "Points" as Points
participant "Rewards" as Rewards

User ->> Wellbie : Sets a Goal

general use case

    UserDigitalProfile -> Challenges : Select from list
    Challenges -> UserDigitalProfile : creates or accepts
    UserDigitalProfile -> Challenges : Confirms with ML and Garmin watch activity logs

    Challenges -> Achievements : Confirms with ML and Garmin watch activity logs

    UserDigitalProfile -> Achievements : Sets a Goal
